special_mechanics.name: Ship Gravity Well Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Battles take place on a single screen with overhead view. The battlefield includes a planet as a gravity well, which ships can either crash into, or glide nearby to gain momentum.

special_mechanics.name: Ship Movement
special_mechanics.description: Each of 14 different starships has unique speed, battery capacity, crew (health), and cost characteristics. Ships feature distinct movement properties that vary by faction and ship type.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative only. Star Control is a space combat strategy game, not a platformer. Player character physics (gravity, jump, acceleration) are not applicable. Documented mechanics relate to spacecraft behavior in zero-gravity combat scenarios with planetary gravity wells as environmental hazards. Movement is controlled via ship maneuvering rather than traditional player character locomotion.
